category_sources: Official GitHub README says Frege is a Haskell for the JVM, purely functional, statically typed, lazy, and compiles to Java.
source_facts.description says Non-strict, functional programming language in the spirit of Haskell.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and documentation use Frege.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links getting started and Frege documentation.
Official frege-lang.org hosts API and language documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Frege/frege, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says Frege is Haskell for the JVM and compiles to Java.
